{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323201629DF3E5D34B7F86CED9945\"}"},"total":64},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7616216750189462297","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的好，不墨迹，没有拉扯。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773292848,"group_id":"7612458189426019390","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"开心快乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxM8Xg3nxbeOZEFhLdcujFWIYmyDHvvfVlH1HLzeECMf","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f86e2d4a1a66448e93add0fdca412dcf~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792420\u0026x-signature=QQJha68Ir9nniKwD4uj7Ts%2BxBjY%3D","user_id":"4178585732514728","user_name":"爱吃草莓的木土"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4178585732514728","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612458189426019390","book_info":{"abstract":"王明和余水本是一对恩爱夫妻，意外穿越到情满四合院世界。王明成为八岁孤儿，余水则附身在八岁的何雨水身上。闫埠贵见王明母亲刚去世、孤身一人，便想趁机捞取好处，结果偷鸡不成蚀把米，被王明当场制服。王明让何雨水报警，最终将闫埠贵送入监狱，判处八年劳动改造。从此，王明与余水在四合院的故事正式展开。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d4bf6b31c0527c70793475ed0db11312","author":"晴天520下雨","author_id":"","book_id":"7612458189426019390","book_name":"四合院之开局送闫埠贵去劳改","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男频衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detai
